title: KINGLAKE 25 Yards Double Sided Pink Velvet Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, 10mm Thick Narrow Ghristmas Ribbon for Xmas Tree Decoration, Hair, Bows Making, Crafts
features: [DOUBLE-SIDED VELVET RIBBON] The pink ribbon is made of high-quality velvet, with fluff on both sides, feels soft and comfortable, without worrying about the inconsistency of the front and back. The thick ribbon is not easy to break, wrinkle, fade, easy to shape, can be used for a long time and reuse.

[LUXURY AND ELEGANCE] Pink velvet ribbon adds luxury to your plain wrapped gifts or handmade crafts, looking delicate , elegant and vintage, and adding a festive atmosphere. No one rejects the surprises of life, it is also an impressive and wonderful gift for family and friends.

[EASY TO USE AND STORE] 10 mm wide and 25 yards /22 meters long, the thin ribbon is rolled in a cardboard spool for easy use and storage without wrinkles, allowing you to take full advantage of the beauty of the ribbon. You are free to cut the desired length, the ribbon is flexible and can be easily tied to achieve the desired look.

[CHRISTMAS RIBBON] This 10 mm velvet ribbon holds its shape well, perfect for making Christmas bows, is a beautiful decorative ribbon for Christmas gift wrapping, Christmas tree wreaths, bells and wreaths and other hanging ornaments, can also be used to decorate napkins, Xmas candlesticks, mantel, stairs.

[WIDELY USED] The vintage ribbon is suitable for wrapping daily presents, making cards, scrapbooks, chokers, earrings, jewelry making, hair clips, headbands, fashion clothing accessories, sewing, can also be used to decorate bottles, bouquets, invitations, candy boxes, gift bags/baskets, ideal for Xmas, birthday parties, weddings, Valentine's Day, Mother’s Day, Easter, Baby Shower, etc.
description: KINGLAKE 10mm Pink Velvet Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, 25 Yards Double Sided Velvet Ribbon Thick Narrow Brown Ghristmas Ribbon for Xmas Tree Decoration, Hair, Bows Making, Crafts
